items.title: The Residential Housing Cycle Has Turned
items.description: Discover the factors driving the residential housing cycle, regional home price trends, and the challenges in key states.

items.title: Powell At Jackson Hole: Rate Cut Likely, Or Is It?
items.description: Powell's Jackson Hole speech hinted at a September rate cut, but labor concerns and data show high uncertainty. Read why markets rallied, but caution is key.

items.title: Fed Rate Cuts Don't Mean Lower Bond Yields
items.description: Powell struck a neutral tone at Jackson Hole, but sticky inflation and market dynamics suggest long-term yields may rise. Find out why the bond market holds control.

items.title: Likely Rate Cuts Will Provide Crucial Tailwinds, Expected Mixed Inflation
items.description: Upcoming Fed rate cuts may ease economic strain, support hiring, and boost consumption despite slowdown risks. Learn why rate relief could sustain momentum ahead.

items.title: Goodbye Growth? Here's What I'm Buying As Value Mounts A Comeback
items.description: Recent underperformance in growth tech stocks reflects doubts about AI, while value-oriented dividend stocks have shown resilience and defensiveness. See more here.
